titleStmt.title: SII 20.142: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 142. (B.K. No. 66 of 1935-36.) BĀḶAMBĪḌ, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple called Bōḷadēva-guḍi.

summary.p: This record is dated the cyclic year Pārthiva, Kārtika, s11u. Monday, Saṁkramaṇa Neither the Śaka nor the regnal year of the king is given. The tithi also is omitted. The cyclic year Pārthiva which occurred during the reign of Bijjala coincided with A.D. 1165 and the S11ukla-paksha of Kārtika fell in October. In that paksha occurred two Mondays, one on the 11th and the other on the 18th of October. There was no Saṁkramaṇa on either of the days. In the absence of the tithi it is not possible to determine as to which of the two Mondays was intended.

The inscription records a grant of land made by Kēśava-daṇḍanāyaka, the officer in charge of taxes (suṅkādhikāri) for the benefit of the temple of God Brahmēśvaradēva, attached to that of the God Chikēśvaradēva of Baḷḷarabīḍu.
The grant was made in the presence of the karaṇas, headed by Siddhugidaṇḍanāyaka, Hariharagāvuṇḍa, heggaḍe Bīraṇa and others and was entrusted to Vimalaśaktidēva, the āchārya of the temple.
The conquests of Bijjala are enumerated and the genealogy of Kēs11ava-daṇḍanāyaka is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahārājādhirāja kāḷāṁjarapurava
rādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuryyakuḷa
kamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ kadanapracaṁḍaṁ mānakanakācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ
kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ gajasāmantaṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ vairībhakaṇṭhī
ravaṁ niśśaṁkamallaṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ sanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla caladaṁkarāma
rāyarācāryyanityakhiḷanāmāvaḷīvirājamāna śrīmadu bhujabaḷacakrava
rtti tribhuvanamalla bijjaṇadēvarasaru kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyalātana pratāpaveṁteṁdaḍe . cōḷikalāḷagauḷamaleyāḷateluṁgaka
ḷiṁgavaṁgapaṁcāḷaturaḥkagūrjjarayajāhutimāḷavakoṁkaṇādibhūpāḷakaraṁji becci be
sakeyye dharitriyanēkacatradiṁ pāḷisi bijjabhūpanesedaṁ salalītanatipratāpadiṁ . v® . svasti sa
mastabhūbhujapavitravicitratirīṭa kōṭivinyastapadaṁ parēṣṭabudhamānatayācakavāṁchchiRead kirīṭa.
tārtthasadvastuvarapradānakaranūrjjitatējaniḷādhirājalōkastutanāgi bijjanripanī dha
reyaṁ pratipāḷisuttiralu . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . harisutaniṁdavatyadhikarillenutippudu
lōkavella suṁdarateyoḷobbanaṇminoḍavuḷḷuḍe bhāvisalīgaḷīgaḷā harisutaniṁdavā haritanūbhava
niṁ hariputtraniṁdaḷaṁkarisitu rūpu dāna jayadunnati siddhugidaṁḍanāthana . tatpāda padmōpajīvi . Āra
meya suraddrumadinoppuva siddharasōdadiṁda gaṁbhīrataṭākamaṁ paruṣadiṁ śivaliṁga manoppe māḍi takṣī
ranimittavittu suradhēnuvanā phaḷadiṁdavī mahōdāraguṇāḍhyanaṁ paḍedaḷaṁbike kēśava daṁḍanāthana . va
nadhigabhīraneṁdu sujanāgraṇiyeṁdu viśiṣṭaneṁdu sajjananutaneṁdu dīnajanakalpitakalpa kujātaneṁdu
peṁpina kaṇiyeṁdu rūpamakaradhvajaneṁdakhiḷāvanītaḷaṁ manamosedeyde ba(ṁ)ṇnipudu suṁkada kēśava
daṁḍanāthana . Ātana tammaṁ sale vikhyātaṁ bāceya bammaneṁbivarirvvarbbhūtaḷadoḷagati dakṣarmmātē
nō rāmalakṣmaṇākārateyiṁ . mata mā hānuṁgallaynūṟaṟa suṁkadadhikāri kēśavadaṁḍa nāyakara bhā
radvājagōtrānvayaprabhāvamentene . baḷayuta viṣṇugaṁ negardda kāmaladēviga puṭṭi darmmahājaḷa
dhigabhīrarīśvaraparānatareṁbina kēśirājanujvaḷayaśanapa bācaṇana rēmana baṇnipudeyde niccaluṁ ja
ḷanidhivṛttamantavaḷayōrvviyoḷaṁ jagadēkavīrara . pāḷisi kaḷpabhūmi paḍedantire kēśava daṁḍanāthanaṁ mēḷisi
koṁḍu kalpalateyantire suttiraleyde baṇnikuṁ bāḷamriṇāḷasaṁnibhadaḷāyatanētreya raṁ nirantaraṁ kāḷaladēviyaṁThe letter ya is written above the line.
lakṣmīdēviyarirvvarumaṁ dharātaḷa . vācaspati maṁtradoḷeṁbī caturateyaseva kēśirājana satiyaṁ bhūcakraṁ mi
ge baṇnikuṁ bācaladēviyanudāraguṇasaṁnuteyaṁ . mattamā kēśavadaṁḍanāyakara maidunaneḍeOḷaleppatta
ṟa suṁkaverggaḍe kāmayyana prabhāvaventene . śrīramaṇanakhiḷavidyāśrīramaṇaṁ sakaḷa vibdhajana
(jana)saṁstutaneṁdāra manaṁgaḷoḷippaṁ dhāriṇiyoḷe sujana suṁkaverggaḍe kāmaṁ . kamanīya kāminī
mukhakamaḷadaḷasghuṭitabhānu lakṣmīlalanāramaṇīyastanahāraṁ sumanōbhūdharasamāna neni
paṁ kāmanu . mattamā suṁkada kēśavadaṁḍanāyakaru kaṁtiya harahaḷḷi baḷḷarabīḍina (na) śrī cikēśvaradēva
ra saṁmaṁdhiyappa brahmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ raṁgabhōgakkaṁ nityanivēdyakka(ṁ) mallippa tapōdhanara grāsakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita jī
rṇnōddhāramāṭakūṭaprāsādakkaveṁdu svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa maunānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśī
ḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadu brahmēśvaradēvarācāryyarappa vimaḷaśaktidēvara kālaṁ karcci pārtthiva saṁvachchara kārtti
ka suddha sōmavāra saṁkramaṇa dvitīpātadaṁdu siddhugidaṁḍanāyaka pramukha karaṇaṁgaḷu sahi(hi)ta hariharagāvuṁ
ḍa heggaḍe bīraṇa pramukhavaṟuvattokala sannidhānadoḷu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru biṭṭa vṛtiyeṁ
teṁdaḍe . śrī brahmēśvaradēvara tōṭadaḍake Eleya hejjuṁka vaḍḍarāvuḷa bilkoḍeye ṁdiṁ
tī mūṟu suṁkamaṁ ma(ṁ)tta 20 mūvattettinokkaludeṟe suṁkasahitavāgi sarvvabādha
parihāravāgi biṭṭaru mattavainūrvvasvāmigaḷu maḷavege bēḷe hasuṁbege vīsa hēṟiṁ
ge vīsavaṁ biṭṭaru matta hariharagāvuṁḍanarevattalu gaddeyaṁ biṭṭaru mattaṁ dēvara naṁdādī
vige(ge) 1 goṁdu gāṇava biṭṭaru mattaveraḍokkalasāgida teṟeyaṁ biṭṭaru kēsimayya daṁḍanā(ṁ)
yaka ru . mattamā vimaḷaśaktipaṁḍitadēvara gurukuḷānvayaveṁtene . nirvvāṇamuni janastutanurvvīThe letterka is written above the line.
patiniṭaḷaghaṭitapadasaraśīrhaṁ sarvvajñakalpanenisidanurvvige nirvvāṇaśaktipaṁḍitadēvanu . Avarggati
nirmmaḷaśiṣyapravaraṁ sakaḷēśvarāryyanurvvīhāra bhavapadapadmanatanena(na)lavarggādaṁ vāmaśaktiyatipatiśiṣya[ṁ .]
sarvvadayāvaḷōkanasubījamanuttama jīvadhātriyoḷu parvvire bitti dānajaḷamaṁ taṇiyūḍidaḍe
yde nāṁṭi bēḷvērvvaledī jagatrayavanāvarisi prabhu vāmaśaktiyoṁdurvvida kīrttivallari nimirddudajāṁḍa
vaneyde tōrpina . mattamā sakaḷēśvaradēvariṁ kiṟiyaru bhavadbhavadēvara śiṣyaru vāmaśaktidēvariṁ kiṟi
yarappa vimaḷasaktidēvara prabhāvamentene . Aṁbaravaneyde negarddesevaṁbudhigaḷa tereya naḍardu digdantiya
daṁtaṁ biḍidu lōkamaṁ sale tuṁbirddudu kīrti vimaḷaśaktibratiya . © Idanī yaṁdadoḷeyde pāḷisi
davaṁgiṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhi saṁbhavikuṁ koṁḍaḷidaṁge gaṁge gaye kēdāraṁ kurukṣētrameṁbiva ṟoḷe pēsade pā
rvvaraṁ goravaraṁ gōbriṁdamaṁ tave koṁdikkida pāpavakkuva(va)nituṁ mahārauravamrātadoḷu . svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāḥ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . © Uttarikau
dve gurubhakte
Digital edition of SII 20.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
